headline: 4 Low-Beta Defensive Stocks to Take Refuge in Amid Sky-High Inflation
summary: ATO, AWR, KDP, ETR emerge as low-beta picks as inflation spikes on Iran tensions, boosting the appeal of defensive stocks with steady growth outlooks.

raw.headline: 4 Low-Beta Defensive Stocks to Take Refuge in Amid Sky-High Inflation

headline: North America Demand Weakens: Can KO Offset it With Global Growth?
summary: Coca-Cola faces North America demand pressure, but global strength and emerging market strategy may help offset weakness and sustain growth.

raw.headline: North America Demand Weakens: Can KO Offset it With Global Growth?
raw.summary: Coca-Cola faces North America demand pressure, but global strength and emerging market strategy may help offset weakness and sustain growth.

headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks with Solid Fundamentals and 1 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.
